title: Intensely Pungent French Fish Rillettes
description: A pungent and tender French dish featuring fish and speck, perfect for a show-off appetizer or snack. This pescatarian-friendly recipe is made with a whisk and formed into rillettes.

ingredients.name: mackerel fillets
ingredients.notes: canned in oil, drained and flaked

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the flaked mackerel, chopped speck, shallots, capers, lemon juice, and olive oil until well combined.
Season the mixture with salt and black pepper to taste.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, give the mixture a good stir and adjust the seasoning if needed.
Spoon the rillettes into small serving cups or ramekins.
Garnish with chopped fresh herbs, such as parsley or chives, if desired.
Serve the rillettes chilled, accompanied by toasted bread or crackers.
